headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Travelers Companies, Raises Price Target to $321
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst David Motemaden   maintains Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $317 to $321.

headline: TRV Q1 Deep Dive: Underwriting Strength and Investment Gains Offset Flat Revenue
summary: Property and casualty insurer Travelers (NYSE:TRV) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales flat year on year at $11.88 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $7.71 per share was 8.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
